title: Park Picnic 公园野餐
scene: Mom带Amy和Ben去公园野餐，准备食物。

lines.en: Kids, today we are going on a picnic in the park!
lines.zh: 孩子们，今天我们去公园野餐！

lines.en: Yay! Can I help pack the food?
lines.zh: 好耶！我能帮忙装食物吗？

lines.en: Sure. Please put the sandwiches in the basket.
lines.zh: 当然。请把三明治放进篮子里。

lines.en: Done! What else do we need?
Bring some apples, juice boxes, and napkins.
lines.zh: 带些苹果、果汁盒和餐巾纸。

lines.en: Should we bring a blanket to sit on?
Good thinking! Yes, grab the big red blanket.
lines.zh: 想得好！对，拿那块大红色的毯子。

lines.en: Of course! Ben, get your shoes on. We are leaving.
lines.zh: 当然！Ben，穿好鞋子。我们要出发了。

lines.en: This is going to be the best picnic ever!
lines.zh: 这一定会是最棒的野餐！
